history:
const lib = await api.require('tauri-title-sync'); console.log('lib:', lib, 'sync:', lib?.sync);            
  lib.sync("Test from REPL");

const hob = await api.require('hob-interpreter'); const env = hob.createEnv(api); await hob.eval('(let [lib 
  (require "tauri-title-sync")] (println "lib:" lib) (when lib (invoke lib "sync" "Hob Test")))', env);

const imp = await api.require("obsidian-import");
await imp.importVault(api);

api.evaluateHob(["transclude", ":self", ":test-field"], { item: await                                       
  api.get("6592f196-bbfa-4d91-a1aa-ababda4a296d") }).then(r => console.log("result:", r,                      
  JSON.stringify(r))).catch(e => console.error("error:", e))

document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.shiftKey && e.ctrlKey) console.log('key:', e.key, 'code:',
   e.code) })

document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {                                                                 
    if (e.key === 'N' && e.shiftKey && e.ctrlKey) {         
      console.log('meta:', e.metaKey, 'alt:', e.altKey,
        'active:', document.activeElement?.tagName,                                                           
        'editable:', document.activeElement?.isContentEditable,
        'handler:', !!window._userKeyboardHandler,                                                            
        'rootId:', new URLSearchParams(location.search).get('root'),                                          
        'container:', !!document.querySelector(`[data-container-id="${new 
  URLSearchParams(location.search).get('root')}"]`))                                                          
    }                                                       
  })
